Rider was "at the restaurant, 11 mins away" for TWO HOURS. Same lie, refreshing forever. He never picked up a single call. Your AI bot is a brick wall with a typing animation — understands nothing, loops endlessly. Agents promised a refund AND cashback. Got neither. Ticket closed, money gone, "resolved." While the connectivity and options - be it Instamart or food are nice, the customer service policy is absolutely abysmal. If the restaurant you order (listed as "only on Swiggy") serves you spoilt food - ones that can cause food poisoning. You are not refunded the money you paid. You are given 50 rupees refund. Today I had my order delivered by a physically challenged delivery partner who was non-verbal. I was genuinely inspired by his dedication & confidence.
